rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Good grief[ST:wide ]—
We've been hit by quite an unexpected accident, haven't we.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0020
rows.name:
To divide our forces like this,
he's quite clever for a monster.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0030
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Ah,
I have absolutely no issues, of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0040
rows.name:
I was inspecting the enemy situation until you arrived.
A rough analysis is already complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Heh. Now that I have rendezvoused with you,
the resolution of all things is close at hand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0060
rows.name:
If I achieve military merits in this decisive battle,
I will steadily approach the seat of the next commander[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0070
rows.name:
Now, let's go without dawdling!
The enemy won't wait for us, after all![ST:wait ]
